premise: My brother and I turned a $5,000 catering cart into a million-dollar business over 25 years, but while I ran the kitchen he siphoned $340,000 into a shell company and forged a buyout to push me out with nothing. I burned my retirement savings on a forensic accountant, uncovered the paper trail, and on the day he was set to close a major expansion deal I tipped off his bank and biggest client about the embezzlement — the loan vanished, the client canceled, and I won a judgment and a lien on his house, which I now own and rent to his ex-wife.

thumb.label: Thumbnail + metadata
thumb.detail: My Brother Embezzled $340,000 And Left Me With Nothing. So I Watched His Deal Fa
